title: Olympia Kings Cutlery Table Forks (Pack of 36), 205(L) mm, 18/0 Stainless Steel, High Polished Finish, Dishwasher Safe, Table Dining Forks, Restaurants Pubs Bars Bistros Cafés or Home Use | D683
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ELEGANT DESIGN: Featuring a polished finish & regency crest design on the handle, our Kings Table Forks add sophistication to any dining table
PACK OF 12 FORK SET: Perfect for larger families, dinner parties or catering events
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of durable 18/0 stainless steel material that ensures longevity, rust resistance & an easy-care surface
USER-FRIENDLY SIZE: Our forks are perfectly sized at 205mm for comfortable use
VERSATILE USES: Suitable for everyday use as well as special occasions such as weddings, banquets, or formal gatherings. These elegant forks complement any type of meal
EASY TO CLEAN: With its sleek design & dishwasher safe material, the cleaning process is effortless & stress-free
description: From the manufacturer About Us This is tableware that’s as strong in looks as it is in build. Tableware everyone can count on, service after service. Tableware to suit all styles, and all budgets. This is Olympia. Olympia D683 12X Kings Table Fork 207mm 18/0 Stainless Steel Cutlery Kitchen The collection from Olympia is made from 18/0 stainless steel that receives multiple levels of polishing and buffing to produce a high-shine finish. It has a quality feel and balance that will ensure a comfortable feel in the hand.
